papers.title: Trust the Batch, On- or Off-Policy: Adaptive Policy Optimization for RL Post-Training
papers.central_question: Can the current batch quantify behavior-policy mismatch and set both policy-gradient weighting and off-policy regularization without a fixed clipping factor?

papers.title: RoFormer: Enhanced Transformer with Rotary Position Embedding
papers.central_question: Can absolute position be encoded in query and key representations while their inner product depends explicitly on relative position?

runs.label: Reviewed reference
runs.description: Human-reviewed frozen API outputs used as the reference run.
runs.model_summary: Human-reviewed API-shaped JSON fixture. It is a reference condition, not a frontier-model benchmark result.

comparison_protocol.rule: Only complete, validated, frozen bundles appear in the model-run selector.

candidate_runs.label: GPT-5.5 · Bedrock
candidate_runs.model_summary: OpenAI frontier reasoning model for complex professional work, served through Bedrock Mantle.
candidate_runs.note: Smoke-tested locally on 2026-07-22. Public US East rate card: $5.50/M input and $33/M output.

candidate_runs.label: Gemini 3.1 Pro · Vertex/WInE credential
candidate_runs.model_summary: Google preview reasoning model; response and reasoning tokens share the output rate.
candidate_runs.note: Smoke-tested locally on 2026-07-22. Standard ≤200K rate card: $2/M input and $12/M output.

candidate_runs.label: Qwen3 32B · Bedrock
candidate_runs.model_summary: Qwen's 32B dense model with hybrid thinking modes and a 32K context window.
candidate_runs.note: Smoke-tested locally on 2026-07-22; cost remains unavailable until a region-matched public rate is pinned.

candidate_runs.label: Qwen3 8B · Babel/vLLM
candidate_runs.model_summary: Qwen's 8.2B dense hybrid-thinking model, served in BF16 on one Babel L40S with a 32K native context.
candidate_runs.note: Smoke-tested end to end on 2026-07-22. There is no per-token vendor charge; GPU allocation time must be measured separately.
